forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 54. West southwest wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 6 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

weather_report:
As we drift through the quiet hours before dawn, Downtown San Francisco wraps itself in a gentle embrace of cloud cover, the night air a crisp and refreshing 54 degrees. The west-southwest breeze whispers through the streets, offering a comforting rustle that suggests the slow unfurling of a new day. As the sun stretches its golden limbs across the horizon, expect the clouds to part, revealing a mostly sunny sky. The temperature will inch upward, reaching the low 60s—perfect for those who prefer to balance the lingering coolness of the morning with the warmth of the afternoon, shaped by pleasant gusts from the coast.

Though the horizon may show glimmers of sunnier skies, the marine layer will flirt with the edges of the bay, lending a certain softness to the city's contours. Fog may linger for the early risers, draping its gauzy veil over the Golden Gate Bridge, creating an ethereal scene that beckons to photographers and dreamers alike. A cardigan or light jacket will do well to counterbalance the day’s gentle shifts, particularly as the breeze begins to pulse stronger in the early afternoon. It is a day to explore the hidden nooks of the city: perhaps a stroll through the charming streets of North Beach, a leisurely coffee at an outdoor café, or a visit to the verdant expanses of Golden Gate Park. Let this pleasant Sunday guide you into the embrace of the city, each moment a subtle reminder of the beauty tucked within its fog-kissed avenues.
